purpose: Promise queue with concurrency control, useful for async operation management.
concerns: The package is feature complete with no plans for further development.
Warning regarding native ESM usage and lack of CommonJS support.
The README mentions potential issues with unresolved promises if tasks are cleared.
No specific tests mentioned in the setup or scripts.
Build and clean tasks depend on del-cli which is only in devDependencies.

purpose: Contains test files for the PQueue implementation and the source code for the PQueue class.

key_files.name: advanced.ts
key_files.role: Contains advanced test cases for the PQueue class functionality.

key_files.name: basic.ts
key_files.role: Contains basic test cases for the PQueue class functionality.

key_files.name: index.ts
key_files.role: Implements the PQueue class with concurrency control and queuing mechanisms.

key_files.name: lower-bound.ts
key_files.role: Provides a utility function to compute the insertion index for sorted arrays.

concerns: Some test cases may have missing assertions or error handling, as noted in code comments.
The use of `// eslint-disable-next-line` suppresses potential linting issues that should be reviewed.
The advanced tests are lengthy and can be hard to follow because of the number of assertions.
No specific test coverage or integration tests are mentioned for the latest implementation features.
Some tests may take longer to execute due to delays used in the async functions.
